docs.title: MkDocs Material Template
docs.text: This is a template repository for anyone that wants to use the MkDocs Material Theme.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: To get started, first clone this template by clicking on the Green button labeled Use this template. On the new screen, give your repository a name and make sure to check Include all branches. This will make sure that the gh-pages branch is included, or otherwhise publishing the docs to GitHub Pages could cause errors (See Troubleshooting).

docs.title: Creating pages
docs.text:
To create new pages, just add new markdown files to the docs folder of the repository and edit them. MkDocs will then turn those into static HTML pages once you build or deploy the pages.

The template also has some pre-made settings for you to help you with creating documentation much easier. In the mkdocs.yml will you find many settings that you can alter. Please check the comments and the links they have for more info.

It also contains some extensions that might be useful including:

  • Admonition
  • CodeHilite
  • ToC
  • PyMdown Extensions

You're free to add, edit or remove any extension at your own discretion, but keep in mind that some expansions might caus compatibility issues with others.

docs.title: Build Pages
docs.text:
To build pages (locally) can you use the mkdocs build command in your prefered command prompt. Note that for the successful execution of this command you have to...

  • ...be in the folder that contains the mkdocs.yml
  • ...have Python 3.7 installed
  • ...have MkDocs and all required dependencies such as Material for MkDocs installed. Note that Material for MkDocs automatically downloads MkDocs and also certain extensions such as the PyMdown Extensions.

MkDocs would now build the HTML in the defined configuration folder for you to use.

docs.title: Deploy to GitHub
docs.text:
If you want to publish the pages on GitHub Pages can you use the premade workflow for this. This workflow will setup Python, download Material for MkDocs and all its dependencies and deploy the pages to the gh-pages branch to then be viewable under <username>.github.io/<repository> (unless you defined a specific CNAME through a CNAME file in the docs folder).

Note that in order for this to work will you need to have a gh-pages branch already made.

docs.title: Netlify
docs.text:
Netlify is an amazing service to build and deploy pages. This template comes with a runtime.txt which is used by Netlify to determine the Python version used (They use an old version of Python... Don't ask why).

For more information, please check out their website.

docs.title: Troubleshooting
docs.text:
The deploy action gives me an error when deploying. What is the issue?

There can be many issues but the most common ones are that you either don't have a gh-pages branch set or that the requirements.txt file is missing or its content is invalid.

Can I alter the overall style of the pages?

Yes. Material for MkDocs supports Theme extensions, meaning you can override specific parts of a theme by providing the particula file in a folder and defining this folder as the custom_dir one in the mkdocs.yml. This template ships with a theme folder that can be used for that and you can just uncomment the aforementioned line in the YAML file.

docs.title: Dependabot
docs.text:
The repository contains a dependabot.yml file inside the .github folder which allows automatic updates through GitHub's Dependabot. It is configured to target both Python dependencies (inside the requirements.txt) and GitHub Actions dependencies, to make sure bot are updated accordingly.

Note that it is configured by default to add the Type: Update (Dependency) label and also the Target: Python (pip) label for Python and Target: GitHub Actions label for GitHub Actions Dependencies. Those labels don't exist by default so you have to either create them, or alter the ones in the dependabot.yml (You can also just remove the labels sections).

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
A big thank you goes to the following people/groups:

  • MkDocs for providing the software, to generate documentation.
  • squidfunk for the MkDocs Material Theme.
  • facelessuser for the PyMdown Extensions.

docs.title: License
docs.text: This template is served under the MIT license. Read the LICENSE file for more info.

docs.title: The Adventure of Finn the Fearless Fish
Chapter 1: The Hidden Reef
docs.text:
\(x^y\)

\[\sum_{i=0}x^y\]

In the vibrant depths of the Crystal Blue Sea, there lived a small, daring fish named Finn. Unlike the other fish in his school, Finn was not content to swim aimlessly among the corals and seaweed. He dreamed of adventure beyond the safety of the vibrant reef.

One sunny morning, while darting through the kelp forest, Finn overheard two elder fish discussing a legendary place known only as the Hidden Reef. It was said to be a home to glittering treasures and exotic fish that no one had ever seen. The elders spoke in whispers, warning of the dangers beyond the safety of the coral, but Finn’s heart raced with excitement.

"I must find this Hidden Reef!" he declared, determination sparkling in his bright blue eyes.

docs.title: Chapter 2: The Journey Begins
docs.text:
With a flick of his tail, Finn set off on his journey. The water flowed with him, carrying him through a maze of swaying seaweed and colorful corals. As he ventured farther from his home, the landscape changed. The vibrant colors faded into deeper blues, and the light grew dim.

Finn met various creatures along the way, including Shelly, a wise old turtle who had seen many depths of the ocean.

“Be careful, young fish,” Shelly warned, her eyes glimmering with knowledge. “The ocean is beautiful but also filled with surprises.”

“I’ll be brave! I seek the Hidden Reef,” Finn replied with a confident smile.

With a gentle smile and a nod, Shelly pointed him in the right direction, reminding him to trust his instincts.

docs.title: Chapter 3: Trials and Allies
docs.text:
As Finn swam deeper into the ocean’s embrace, he encountered various challenges. First, he had to navigate through the Dark Trench, where shadows loomed large and strange sounds echoed around him. Finn hesitated, but his desire for adventure pushed him forward. He swam swiftly, using courage to guide him past lurking predators.

Next, he came across a tangled mass of fishing nets. Many fish were trapped, struggling to escape. Seeing their plight, Finn's heart ached.

“Don’t worry! I’ll help you!” Finn called out, rallying the trapped fish to work together. With teamwork and determination, they cleverly maneuvered to free each other from the nets, and in gratitude, the freed fish decided to join Finn on his quest.

As a team, they swam further, facing obstacles together. Finn’s bravery inspired others, and he made friends with many creatures along the way, including Glimmer, a dazzling angelfish, and Bubbles, a bubbly clownfish.

docs.title: Chapter 4: The Hidden Reef
docs.text:
After what felt like days of swimming, Finn and his friends finally arrived at the edge of the Hidden Reef. Their eyes widened in awe as the reef unfolded before them like a treasure chest bursting with color and life. The water sparkled with shades of gold, and vibrant fish danced through the corals.

Finn felt a mix of joy and wonder. Here were the exotic fish from the legends, and treasures lay scattered about—glistening pearls, shimmering seashells, and the rarest coral formations.

But Finn was then faced with a choice: to keep the treasures for himself or to share them. In that moment, he remembered the teamwork and friendship that had brought him here.

“I think these treasures should belong to all of us.” Finn smiled. “Let’s celebrate our adventure together!”

docs.title: Chapter 5: The Celebration
docs.text:
The news of the Hidden Reef spread quickly among the depths of the ocean, drawing creatures from far and wide. They gathered to celebrate the courage of Finn and his friends. Under the twinkling light of the ocean’s surface, they sang and danced, sharing stories of bravery, adventure, and friendship.

Finn knew that the real treasure was not the pearls or shells, but the memories made and the bonds formed during their adventure.

As the sun set, casting a warm glow over the ocean, Finn looked around at his new friends. He realized that he had discovered not just a hidden place, but the true meaning of community.

docs.title: Epilogue: A New Beginning
docs.text:
From that day on, Finn the Fearless Fish became a legend in the ocean. He and his friends continued to explore new paths, always ready to help others and seek new adventures together.

And in the heart of the Crystal Blue Sea, the stories of Finn and the Hidden Reef would be passed down through the currents, inspiring fish of all sizes to be brave and adventurous, just like him.

Finn knew that no treasure was as valuable as friendship and the courage to explore the unknown. If you did active listening without active listening without conflict.
